assets.description: Side-by-side PowerShell (left, primary) and Bash (right, alternate) panel showing the 5 exchanges: launch nano, type three lines, save with Ctrl+O, press Enter then Ctrl+X, read back with cat

PNG render of the same 5-exchange side-by-side panel. Nano UI lines (title strip, help strip, Modified marker, File Name to Write prompt, Wrote 3 lines confirmation) are rendered inline in the output area of each exchange

Typewriter animation of the 5-exchange PowerShell-primary walkthrough including the nano launch, the typing pass, the save prompt, the exit sequence, and the cat verify. Rendered with a 48-colour adaptive palette and typing_step=2
PowerShell-first screen-reader transcript with the full nano session (open, type, save with Ctrl+O plus Enter, exit with Ctrl+X, cat verify) plus the one-time winget install note for Windows 11
